pr.title: Non-record Submission: CrystalGPT + Diamond Fusion — Ternary Crystal Architecture

output.summary: CrystalGPT reuses a single transformer block with crystal modulation gates, ternary voting, and Diamond Fusion consensus to reduce parameters.
techniques: Recurrent single transformer block with per-iteration crystal modulation gates
Consensus-weighted Diamond Fusion experts with ternary voting states
Partial RoPE + GQA attention paired with LeakyReLU² MLP
